home.upcoming.title: Our tours and the places we love
home.upcoming.subtitle: Tailor-made and group journeys in Italy and around the world. Storico Viaggi and exclusive escorted tours to experience culture, nature, and emotions with complete peace of mind.
home.upcoming.empty: No upcoming trips at the moment. Check back soon or view our travel history.
home.about.title: Travel agency and tour operator
home.about.body: We are an agency based in Sesto San Giovanni (Milan). We design tailor-made and group trips in Italy and worldwide: culture, nature, authentic experiences, and an attention to detail that makes the difference.
home.testimonials.title: What our travelers say
home.cta.eyebrow: Every hundred meters the world changes
home.cta.body: For information or requests, please fill in the Information Form. Data will be processed in compliance with GDPR (EU Reg. 2016/679).
footer.quote.text:
“Once you have traveled, the journey never ends, but is played out over and over again in the quietest chambers of the mind.
The mind can never break off from the journey.”
footer.quote.author: — Pat Conroy
footer.whatsapp.label: Message us on WhatsApp
footer.email.label: Email us

profile.title: Your profile
profile.subtitle: Your details and bookings.
profile.noBookings: You haven't requested any trips yet.
profile.stepDetail.requested: We have received your trip request. Our team will review it and contact you with the next steps.
profile.stepDetail.confirmed: Your booking is confirmed. Follow the payment instructions we sent you to pay the deposit and secure your place.
profile.stepDetail.depositPaid: We have registered your deposit. Your seat is reserved. Please complete the remaining balance by the agreed date.
profile.stepDetail.paid: Full payment has been received. You will get final travel documents and practical information before departure.
profile.stepDetail.completed: This trip is completed. Thank you for traveling with us.
profile.stepDetail.upcoming: This stage comes later. The text above describes what happens when your booking reaches this step.
